placeholders.settings.input_mode_help: # @markdown - `INPUT_MODE`: E ho Ľohana `upload`no nńĀ faila kŇęloko a i  Ľole `google_drive`no nńĀ faila i waiho mua  Ľia ma Google Drive.
placeholders.settings.drive_help: # @markdown Ho Ľohana  Ľia kńďia mau ho Ľonohonoho inńĀ `INPUT_MODE == "google_drive"`.
placeholders.settings.drive_root_help: # @markdown - `GOOGLE_DRIVE_ROOT`: E mńĀlama mau i kńďia ho Ľonohonoho i `/content/drive/MyDrive`.
placeholders.settings.drive_subpath_help: # @markdown - `GOOGLE_DRIVE_SUBPATH`: He waihona a waihona paha ala ma lalo o MyDrive. E waiho hakahaka no ka ho Ľohana  Ľana i ka waihona MyDrive ki Ľeki Ľe.
placeholders.settings.recursive_help: # @markdown - `RECURSIVE`: InńĀ he waihona ke ala ho Ľokomo Drive, e huli pŇę i nńĀ waihona waihona.
placeholders.settings.filename_contains_help: # @markdown - `FILENAME_CONTAINS`: He kńĀnana substring inoa waihona koho.
placeholders.settings.model_help: # @markdown - `MODEL_ID`: Hugging FaceID kumu ho ĽohńĀlike.  ĽOi aku ka wikiwiki o Turbo; large-v3hiki ke pa'a no kekahi mau faila.
placeholders.settings.language_help: # @markdown - `SOURCE_LANGUAGE`: E ho Ľohana `auto`ke  Ľike  Ľole  Ľia, a i  Ľole e koho i kahi  ĽŇćlelo kumu i  Ľike  Ľia.
placeholders.settings.translate_help: # @markdown - `TRANSLATE_TO_ENGLISH`: E ho Ľohana Whisperke  Ľano unuhi no ka ho Ľopuka  Ľana i ka  ĽŇćlelo Pelekania.
placeholders.settings.output_help: # @markdown - `SAVE_OUTPUTS_TO_GOOGLE_DRIVE`: E mńĀlama i nńĀ mea ho Ľopuka ma lalo o Google Driveke ho Ľohana  Ľia ka ho Ľokomo Drive.
placeholders.settings.auto_download_help: # @markdown - `AUTO_DOWNLOAD_ZIP`: Hana a ho Ľoiho i ho Ľokahi ZIPwaihona ma ka hopena.
placeholders.settings.formats_help: # - Ho Ľoponopono  Ľia nńĀ  Ľano ho Ľopuka e nńĀ booleans ma lalo nei.
placeholders.settings.advanced_help: #  ĽO kńďia mau pa Ľamau he conservative no Colab.  ĽA Ľole pono nńĀ mea ho Ľohana ma Ľamau e ho Ľoponopono ińĀ lńĀkou.
placeholders.messages.choose_files: Kaomi ińĀ 'Choose Files' a ho Ľouka i ho Ľokahi a  Ľoi aku paha nńĀ faila leo/wikiŇć.
placeholders.messages.dependencies_done: Ho Ľopau ka ho Ľonohonoho hilina Ľi.
placeholders.messages.model_loaded: Whisperho ĽohńĀlike i ho Ľouka  Ľia.
placeholders.errors.no_supported_files: ĽA Ľohe waihona leo/wikiŇć i kńĀko Ľo  Ľia.
placeholders.errors.gpu_runtime: This notebook requires a CUDA GPU. In Colab, select Runtime > Change runtime type > Hardware accelerator > GPU, then restart and rerun.
placeholders.intro_markdown:
# WhisperColab Notebook

Ua unuhi kńďia puke i nńĀ faila leo a i  Ľole wikiŇć me Whisper.

## NńĀ hi Ľohi Ľona

- **Ho Ľohana manuahi:** Ke ho Ľohana nei kńďia puke leka [openai/whisper](https://github.com/openai/whisper), i wehe  Ľia e OpenAIma Ianuali 17, 2023, me ka Google Colabka GPUmanawa holo.
- ** ĽA Ľohe palena nui o ka waihona  Ľao Ľao puke puke:** Hiki ke hana  Ľia nńĀ faila leo nui a me nńĀ wikiŇć.
- ** ĽO ka hana pŇę Ľulu:** Hiki ke hana  Ľia nńĀ faila leo a me nńĀ wikiŇć i ka holo ho Ľokahi.
- **Google DrivekńĀko Ľo:** Hiki ke ho Ľouka pololei  Ľia nńĀ faila, a i  Ľole nńĀ faila leo/wikiŇć i mńĀlama  Ľia ma Google Drivehiki ke hana.
- **Pa Ľa pŇęnaewele:** Hana  Ľia nńĀ ho Ľoiho a me ka hana  Ľana ma Google Colab.  ĽA Ľole ho Ľohana  Ľia nńĀ kumuwaiwai helu kŇęloko.
- **Nui nńĀ puka puka:** Ho Ľopuka ka puke puke i ka palapala mua JSONa loa Ľa mai TXT, CSV, Markdown, Excel, a me SRTnńĀ waihona subtitle.

## Pehea e ho Ľohana ai

1. Ma **1. NńĀ ho Ľonohonoho**, koho `INPUT_MODE`a ho Ľololi i ke kumu ho ĽohńĀlike a i  Ľole nńĀ ‚Äč‚Äčkoho ho Ľopuka inńĀ pono.
2. E koho i ka **Rtime -> Run all**.
3. InńĀ `INPUT_MODE = "upload"`, kali a hiki i ka **2. Ho Ľomaka ke koho faila / Google Drivemauna**, a laila kaomi i ka **E koho i nńĀ faila** ma ka wahi puka o ia cell.
4. Ke pau ka hana  Ľana, ho Ľopa Ľa  Ľia nńĀ faila i ho Ľoiho  Ľia a ho Ľoiho  Ľia inńĀ hiki ke `AUTO_DOWNLOAD_ZIP`.

## NńĀ memo

- Google Colabmanuahi GPUhiki ke loa Ľa. InńĀ  Ľa Ľole loa Ľa GPUa `REQUIRE_CUDA = True`, pau ka puke puke ma mua o ke kńĀkau  Ľana.
- Pono ka manawa e hana ai. Ma ke  Ľano he alaka Ľi ko Ľiko Ľi i ka wńĀ e ho Ľohana ai i ke kumu ho ĽohńĀlike large-v3-turbo, hiki i kahi faila leo a i  Ľole wikiŇć he 60 mau minuke ma kahi o 5-10 mau minuke ke kńĀkau  Ľana. InńĀ ho Ľouka pololei  Ľoe i nńĀ faila, pono pŇę ka manawa ho Ľouka.
- E wehe i kńďia puke i ka wńĀ e hana ana. InńĀ pani  Ľoe i ka puke kńĀkau i ka wńĀ kńĀkau, pau ka hana.

readme.subtitle: NńĀ puke puke  ĽŇćlelo Google Colabno Whisperkope.
features: **Ho Ľohana manuahi:** Ke ho Ľohana nei kńďia puke leka [openai/whisper](https://github.com/openai/whisper), i wehe  Ľia e OpenAIma Ianuali 17, 2023, me ka Google Colabka GPUmanawa holo.
** ĽA Ľohe palena nui o ka waihona  Ľao Ľao puke puke:** Hiki ke hana  Ľia nńĀ faila leo nui a me nńĀ wikiŇć.
** ĽO ka hana pŇę Ľulu:** Hiki ke hana  Ľia nńĀ faila leo a me nńĀ wikiŇć i ka holo ho Ľokahi.
**Google DrivekńĀko Ľo:** Hiki ke ho Ľouka pololei  Ľia nńĀ faila, a i  Ľole nńĀ faila leo/wikiŇć i mńĀlama  Ľia ma Google Drivehiki ke hana.
**Pa Ľa pŇęnaewele:** Hana  Ľia nńĀ ho Ľoiho a me ka hana  Ľana ma Google Colab.  ĽA Ľole ho Ľohana  Ľia nńĀ kumuwaiwai helu kŇęloko.

readme.template_note: ĽO ke kumu READMEka wahi komo  ĽŇćlelo Pelekania, a  Ľo docs/READMEnńĀ faila READMEi haku  Ľia.  ĽO ka puke ma Ľamau ka puke puke kumu a loa Ľa nńĀ mea ho Ľokomo e like me `{{cell1.title}}`. HńĀ Ľawi nńĀ faila kŇęloko i ka  ĽŇćlelo kiko Ľńę READMEa me Colab i mua i ke kope. Ho Ľopa Ľa  Ľia nńĀ puke i hana  Ľia no laila e kŇępa Ľa nńĀ loulou Colab.
readme.checks_note: Ho Ľokumu hou ka CI workflow READMEi nńĀ faila a me nńĀ puke mai ka template a me nńĀ faila kŇęloko, e nńĀnńĀ i ka puke puke JSON, e hŇć Ľoia i nńĀ puka  Ľole, e nńĀnńĀ i ka Python syntax i loko o nńĀ cell code, e  Ľimi i nńĀ mea huna i  Ľike  Ľole  Ľia, a hńĀ Ľule i ka wńĀ i hana  Ľole  Ľia nńĀ faila.

readme.ci_limit: Pono ke ala unuhi piha i nńĀ API kiko Ľńę Colab, nńĀ ho Ľoiho ho ĽohńĀlike, GPUloa Ľa, a me nńĀ faila media i hńĀ Ľawi  Ľia e ka mea ho Ľohana. E mńĀlama i kńďlńĀ ala e like me ka ho ĽńĀ Ľo  Ľana i ka uahi Colab manual ma hope o ka hala  Ľana o nńĀ loiloi i hana  Ľia.
readme.license_note: Ua ho Ľoku Ľu  Ľia kńďia waihona READMEgenerator, notebook template, file locale, generated notebooks, and maintenance scripts ma lalo o ka MITLicense. WhispernńĀ kumu ho ĽohńĀlike a me nńĀ mea hilina Ľi  Ľao Ľao  Ľekolu e ho Ľomalu  Ľia e ko lńĀkou mau laikini.
